1.7: Lending is prohibited if the borrower and mortgagor are different entities.
1.14: Firm may not act if the person handling the transaction or their immediate family is the seller.
1.15: Firm may act if the person handling the transaction or their immediate family is the borrower, subject to express written authority from the lender.
3.1.3: Seller's legal representative details only required if specifically requested.

Lender must be notified as soon as property is ready for final inspection.
Completion cannot occur until re-inspection is finished.
4.1: Lender may use Automated Valuation Models (AVM) or physical valuations.
Physical valuation copies will be provided to the conveyancer.
Conveyancer must advise borrower that the report is for lender purposes only and not to be relied upon.
4.3: Contact for incorrect valuation assumptions is section 1.11a.
5.1.1: Contact for properties owned by the seller for less than 6 months is section 1.11a.
5.2.1: Contact if the seller is not the registered proprietor is section 1.11a.
5.4.4: Contact for restrictions affecting marketability is section 1.11a.
5.4.5: Personal searches accepted for Buy to Let if firm is CoPSO registered, has adequate PI insurance, and complies with the Search Code.
5.4.6: Search insurance accepted for Buy to Let remortgages or company transfers where original owners remain.
Search insurance prohibited for HMOs, Multi-unit buildings, mortgage-free remortgages, and semi-commercial properties.
Lender's Title Insurance must be via Lime Risk Agency Limited.
Title Insurance eligibility: Loan amount <= £750,000 (including fees), property in England/Wales, no searches previously undertaken.
5.5.3a: Contact for reporting unmet planning/building conditions is section 1.11a.
5.5.3b: Original planning permission not required; conveyancer must retain copy on file.
5.5.3c: Original building regulation consents not required; conveyancer must retain copy on file.
5.5.3d: Lawful use/development certificates not required; conveyancer must retain copy on file.
5.7.1a: Flying freeholds accepted if the affected area is 15% or less of the property.
5.7.1c: Contact point for reporting freehold flats or flying freeholds is section 1.11a.
5.8.1: Buy to Let: Buildings converted into max 4 flats accepted if borrower occupies one.
Requires a charge on any superior title owned by the borrower.
5.8.5: Cross-leasehold arrangements (e.g., Tyneside flats) are not acceptable.
5.10.1: Contact for restrictions on use is section 1.11a.
5.13.1: Second charges are not permitted; lender will not consent.
5.14.15a: Contact for absentee/insolvent landlords is section 1.11a.
5.14.15b: Indemnity insurance for absent/insolvent landlords accepted if an unqualified COT can be issued.
5.14.17a: No building safety documentation needs to be sent to the lender.
5.14.17b: EWS1 ratings A1, A2, or B1 are acceptable.
PAS 9980 remediation needs must be reported; block must be on Government approved list.
Fire Risk Assessment (FRA) must be obtained for flats and be in-date; do not send copy to lender.
Report if the owner is a non-qualifying leaseholder.
Completion prohibited until written instructions received following building safety reports.
5.14.17c: Remortgage building safety requirements match section 5.14.17b.
5.14.1: Minimum lease term: 70 years remaining at completion.
Minimum lease term at mortgage expiry: 55 years.
Lease must be amended if mortgage protection clause is absent.

5.14.10: Contact for service charge matters is section 1.11a.
5.14.11: Indemnity insurance for unsatisfactory lease terms accepted if no Deed of Variation is possible.

5.14.13: Notice of service evidence not required; retain on file.

5.17.5b: Statutory declaration of non-revocation not required; retain on file.
5.19.1: Lending prohibited on affordable housing, shared equity, and shared ownership (even if 100% staircased).

Solar panels must be owned outright by the borrower.
5.20.4: Green Deal plans prohibited on BTL purchases.
BTL remortgages: Report balance, monthly payment, term, works list, guarantees, and EPC for approval.
